retrieved_result: Q: Networking two computers to access QuickBooks through a modem \"SH Sharon-daskala asked on August 19, 2011Q: Networking two computers to access Quick Books through a modem I am trying to set up two computers to access Quick Books through a modem (Network), but my parent computer won't let me change the permissions to allow the other computer to access the files
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result concerns networking two computers and accessing QuickBooks, not debugging an API integration.
